predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: has_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is not a Union citizen and does not enjoy the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or residence.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_responsibility_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed to assess risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe the alien will abscond, established by individual examination and at least one objective criterion.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien meets at least one of the identification criteria: valid travel document, recognition by national authority, or falls within a nationality category for ministerial laissez-passer.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_by_national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_ministerial_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal residence, or has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: criterion_used_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

predicates.name: criterion_subject_of_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, terminating residence, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on responsibility determination for international protection applications.

predicates.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_prior_international_protection_application
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations on responsibility determination.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_purpose_inconsistent_with_application
predicates.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is established for the person.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a responsibility determination/transfer procedure.
